sections.paragraph:
Philip 1. Brother of Herod and husband of Herodias
Mat 14:3; Mar 6:17; Luk 3:19
2. Tetrarch of Iturea
Luk 3:1
3. One of the seven deacons:
- General references
Act 6:5
- Successfully preaches in Samaria
Act 8:14
- Expounds the scriptures to the Ethiopian eunuch whom he baptizes
Act 8:38
- Caught away by the Spirit to Azotus, preaches in the cities, and goes to Caesarea
Act 8:40
- Abides at Caesarea, and entertains Paul
Act 21:8
- Has four daughters, prophetesses
Act 21:10
4. One of the twelve apostles:
Mat 10:3; Mar 3:18; Luk 6:14; Act 1:13
- Call of
Joh 1:43
- Brings Nathanael to Jesus
Joh 1:50
- Assists in caring for the multitude whom Jesus miraculously feeds
Joh 6:7
- Brings certain Greeks to Jesus who desire to See Him
Joh 12:22
- Asks Jesus to show the Father
Joh 14:13
